015 */
016package edu.cnm.deepdive.pixelcreate.controller;
017
018import android.content.Intent;
019import android.os.Bundle;
020import android.util.Log;
021import android.view.LayoutInflater;
022import android.view.View;
023import android.view.ViewGroup;
024import android.widget.Toast;
025import androidx.activity.result.ActivityResultLauncher;
026import androidx.activity.result.contract.ActivityResultContracts.StartActivityForResult;
027import androidx.annotation.NonNull;
028import androidx.annotation.Nullable;
029import androidx.fragment.app.Fragment;
030import androidx.navigation.NavController;
031import androidx.navigation.Navigation;
032import com.google.android.gms.auth.api.signin.GoogleSignIn;
033import com.google.android.gms.auth.api.signin.GoogleSignInAccount;
034import com.google.android.gms.auth.api.signin.GoogleSignInClient;
035import com.google.android.gms.auth.api.signin.GoogleSignInOptions;
036import com.google.android.gms.common.api.ApiException;
037import com.google.android.gms.tasks.Task;
038import dagger.hilt.android.AndroidEntryPoint;
039import edu.cnm.deepdive.pixelcreate.R;
040import edu.cnm.deepdive.pixelcreate.databinding.FragmentLoginBinding;
041import edu.cnm.deepdive.pixelcreate.model.entity.User;
042import edu.cnm.deepdive.pixelcreate.service.repository.UserRepository;
043import java.time.Instant;
044import javax.inject.Inject;
045
046/**
047 * Fragment for handling Google Sign In authentication. Provides a sign-in button that
048 * launches the Google Sign In flow and navigates to the main app screen upon success.
049 */
050@AndroidEntryPoint
051public class LoginFragment extends Fragment {
052
053  private static final String TAG = LoginFragment.class.getSimpleName();
054
055  private FragmentLoginBinding binding;
056  private GoogleSignInClient client;
057  private ActivityResultLauncher<Intent> launcher;
058
059  @Inject
060  UserRepository userRepository;
061
062  @Override
063  public void onCreate(@Nullable Bundle savedInstanceState) {
064    super.onCreate(savedInstanceState);
065    // Configure Google Sign In
066    GoogleSignInOptions options = new GoogleSignInOptions.Builder(GoogleSignInOptions.DEFAULT_SIGN_IN)
067        .requestEmail()
068        .requestIdToken(getString(R.string.default_web_client_id))
069        .build();
070
071    client = GoogleSignIn.getClient(requireContext(), options);
072    // Register activity result launcher for sign-in
073    launcher = registerForActivityResult(
074        new StartActivityForResult(),
075        result -> {
076          try {
077            Task<GoogleSignInAccount> task = GoogleSignIn.getSignedInAccountFromIntent(result.getData());
078            GoogleSignInAccount account = task.getResult(ApiException.class);
079            handleSignInSuccess(account);
080          } catch (ApiException e) {
081            Log.e(TAG, "Sign in failed", e);
082            Toast.makeText(requireContext(), R.string.sign_in_failed, Toast.LENGTH_LONG).show();
083          }
084        }
085    );
086  }
087
088  @Nullable
089  @Override
090  public View onCreateView(@NonNull LayoutInflater inflater, @Nullable ViewGroup container,
091      @Nullable Bundle savedInstanceState) {
092    binding = FragmentLoginBinding.inflate(inflater, container, false);
093    binding.signInButton.setOnClickListener((v) -> launcher.launch(client.getSignInIntent()));
094    return binding.getRoot();
095  }
096
097  @Override
098  public void onViewCreated(@NonNull View view, @Nullable Bundle savedInstanceState) {
099    super.onViewCreated(view, savedInstanceState);
100    // Check if already signed in
101    GoogleSignInAccount account = GoogleSignIn.getLastSignedInAccount(requireContext());
102    if (account != null) {
103      handleSignInSuccess(account);
104    }
105  }
106
107  @Override
108  public void onDestroyView() {
109    super.onDestroyView();
110    binding = null;
111  }
112
113  private void handleSignInSuccess(GoogleSignInAccount account) {
114    // Create or update user in database
115    User user = new User();
116    user.setOauthKey(account.getId());
117    user.setUsername(account.getDisplayName() != null ? account.getDisplayName() : "User");
118    user.setEmail(account.getEmail() != null ? account.getEmail() : "");
119    user.setCreatedAt(Instant.now());
120    user.setLastLogin(Instant.now());
121    
122    // Save user and navigate to main screen
123    userRepository.save(user)
124        .thenAccept((savedUser) -> {
125          requireActivity().runOnUiThread(() -> {
126            NavController navController = Navigation.findNavController(requireView());
127            navController.navigate(R.id.navigate_to_project_gallery);
128          });
129        })
130        .exceptionally((throwable) -> {
131          requireActivity().runOnUiThread(() -> {
132            Log.e(TAG, "Failed to save user", throwable);
133            Toast.makeText(requireContext(), R.string.sign_in_failed, Toast.LENGTH_LONG).show();
134          });
135          return null;
136        });
137  }
138
139}
